change_summary: Reset-password UI flow with request, sent, verify-low-confidence, and done states.
critical_invariants: The UI never reveals whether an account exists.
A low-confidence request surfaces a verify state rather than silently proceeding.
requirement_closure: Ticket ask: Reset-password UI flow with verify-on-low-confidence states (FR-1.2).
Implemented: request + sent + done states wired to the AUTH-101 service.
Not implemented: verify-low-confidence state still in review.
repo_gates: cd frontend && yarn build [result=pass; attribution=clean] - build ok

self_review_cycles.findings: states modeled explicitly; error path does not reveal account existence
uniform messaging; under review for the verify state
